steps.title: Identify the slope of line k
steps.content: Line k is $y = 6x + \frac{1}{9}$, so its slope is 6.

steps.title: Find the perpendicular slope
steps.content: For perpendicular lines, the slopes are negative reciprocals. The negative reciprocal of 6 is $-\frac{1}{6}$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
